assign.description: Recommend and assign team members to unassigned issues using expertise, capacity, and context proximity analysis.

refine.description: Check issues against exit criteria, identify duplicates, missing fields, unaddressed comments, and readiness for the next status.
refine.argumentHint: [issue key(s), JQL query, or 'sprint' for current sprint]

plan.description: Sprint planning prep: carryover, velocity, capacity, ready-for-planning queue, and sprint fill suggestions. Run before each planning call.

sprint-report.description: Sprint review summary: committed vs completed, per-member breakdown, epic progress, demo checklist with naming conventions, velocity trend.

release.description: Release readiness: feature matrix, PI funnel, epic roll-up, dependency map, blocker bugs, RN readiness, risk assessment.

to-feature.description: Create a RHDHPLAN Feature from conversation context. Grills on scope, customer value, AC. Optionally chains into Epic decomposition.

to-epic.description: Create an RHIDP Epic from conversation context. Grills on delivery scope, dependencies, AC. Optionally chains into Story/Task decomposition.

to-issue.description: Create a Story, Task, Bug, or Spike. Automatically infers the issue type. Grills on implementation details, AC, story points.

update-jira-status.description: Update a Jira issue with session progress. Detects the related issue, adds a status comment, proposes transitions, checks upward cascade to parent Epic/Feature.
